body_html:
les.... wire stephanie tidwell 500 dollars today....

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Jennie Saunders
[mailto:jsaunders@thecoreclub.com]
Sent: Monday, March 06, 2006 5:08 PM
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Subject: TCC Update

Dear Jeffrey,

Our work over the past six months has been
disciplined, inspired, and
extremely satisfying. We’ve been punching out the
last of the construction
details, building and refining the infrastructure to
support our service and
operating model, and creating strategic alliances to
stay true to our
mission to bring you dynamic and exclusive
entertainment content. For us,
the feeling of what is happening – and what is on
the horizon – is nothing
less than exhilarating.

We now need to build on this momentum.

We have been adding 10 to 15 new members a month. To
reach our target
membership base of 800-900 members, we would like to
begin adding 25-30
members per month, and as such we want to make you
aware of two new
membership programs that we’ve introduced.

The first is the Executive Membership Program, which
enables up to five
select senior executives from TCC-vetted companies
to join as a group. The
second is the International Program, which offers
memberships to overseas
residents who use the club on an infrequent basis,
and thus are offered
adjusted initiation fees and annual dues.

Can you please take fifteen minutes over the next
two weeks to think of five
to ten people who would be appropriate for either of
these programs? Many of
you sit on boards with international representation;
perhaps there are
fellow board members who might enjoy taking
advantage of our new
international program. All you have to do is sponsor
these 5-10 candidates
whom you would love to see become members, and we
will do everything else.
Kathryn St. André will follow up with you next week
or feel free to email
her at kstandre@thecoreclub.com with your suggested
nominees’ contact
information.

Your support is crucial in realizing the full
potential of our vision. Thank
you in advance for taking the time to do this.

Best,
Jennie

Jennie Saunders President & Chief Executive Officer
